scripts.build:fixture: pnpm --filter @fixtures/extend-library run build && pnpm --filter @fixtures/layer-library run build
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:fixture && ref sync && (ref sync --watch & vite)
scripts.build: pnpm run build:fixture && ref sync && vite build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build:fixture && ref sync && tsc --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm run build:fixture && ref sync && pnpm run test:vitest && tsc --noEmit
scripts.test:watch-suite: pnpm run build:fixture && REF_UNIT_ENABLE_WATCH_SETUP=1 REF_UNIT_INCLUDE_WATCH_TESTS=1 vitest run tests/watch/watch.test.ts
